roa.docketEntryComment: DEF NOT OF MOT & MOT VACATE CONVICTION PC,1473,7 FILED

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/X: THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA, ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF SEPTEMBER 25, 1998/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:09-25-1998/X: SENTENCE DATE:09-25-1998//X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THEGUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 09-25-1998 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 09-25-1998 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEINGNO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
PEOPLE'S NON-OPPO TO MTN TO SET ASIDE PLEAS  AND VACATE CONV FILED
DISMISS IN VIEW OF P/D TO CT #1BWD,NC
